description: Member of Josa's Open Lab, i contribute to community projects and promote open-source development. Hosted a hands-on Git and GitHub workshop to teach version control principles. Currently building UniVault, a central resource archive, to bring open-source logic to university infrastructure.

Developed and implemented Stockpile,a comprehensive inventory management system tailored for Amazon sellers, Responsible for the design and development within a one-month timeframe, Designed and implemented the event sourcing architecture pattern to track changes to inventory over time.
